name: The Tomb of the Dwarven king
description:
You climb down into the stonechest.  Something about this makes your backbone
shiver.  This place does not seem to like your intrusion.  You can see the
remains of a powerfull looking dwarf.  He wears a shining plate and wields
two-handed axe.  Maybe you shouldn't disturb him.  The only exit seems to be
up.
